axisHistory.note: FINAL Axis A v0 round — CEO P0 mandate; triggered mandatory Axis B catch-up
Mandatory Axis B catch-up Round 1 — CEO P1
Mandatory Axis B catch-up Round 2 (FINAL) — CEO P2
Design-only — no src/ files; does not affect implementation ratio
Axis A v1 contract stub — 1st consecutive Axis A
Axis A v1 source adapters — 2nd consecutive Axis A

policyAssessment.headroom: 0.50 ratio points remaining before policy cap
rationale: 1. Post-P59 ratio = 15:6 = 2.50:1 — well within the 3.0:1 policy cap.
2. No Axis B work was deferred under a CEO mandate at P58 level. P53/P54 catch-up was fully satisfied at 12:6.

3. P57 and P58 form a natural two-part atomic unit: P57 defined the contract; P58 implemented the adapters. P59 (ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder) is the final piece of this atomic unit: the builder that assembles the three adapter outputs.
4. Stopping between P58 and P59 would leave the Axis A v1 chain in a partial, non-functional state — the contract and adapters exist but cannot be assembled into a snapshot without the builder.
5. P59 scope is strictly bounded: one file (ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder.ts), pure TypeScript, no DB, no scoring, no network.

6. P59 being the 3rd consecutive Axis A is justified because it completes an in-flight atomic design unit (P56 design → P57 contract → P58 adapters → P59 builder). Interrupting this chain with a mandatory Axis B round would violate the in-flight completion principle.

7. After P59 completion, GATE must re-assess before any further Axis A work. The post-P59 ratio of 2.50:1 and 3 consecutive Axis A rounds will require either an Axis B round or an explicit P60-GATE decision.

deferredItems.reason: No external caller yet. Created at P59 or after ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder is complete.

techDebtFromP57P58.findingsNote: No tech debt from P57/P58 blocks P59. The contract and all three adapters are type-safe, test-green, and PIT-gated. The only deferred item (index.ts barrel export) is optional and non-blocking.

pendingAxisBOpportunities.note: Optional; would connect Axis B diff artifacts to Axis A v0 export pipeline. Beneficial but not blocking.

deferredAxisBWork.conclusion: No mandatory deferred Axis B work. P53 + P54 satisfied the CEO catch-up mandate. Pending Axis B opportunities are optional improvements that do not block P59.

approvedP59Scope.name: Axis A v1 Research Snapshot Input Builder
optionalAllowedFiles: src/lib/research/snapshot/v1/adapters/index.ts (barrel export — only if test coverage requires it)
mustUse: P57 RealDataSnapshotInputContract (all type imports from this file only)

output.nullHandling: Each adapter invocation: null input → builder sets corresponding field to null. Non-null input: delegates to adapter; adapter may still return null (PIT gate fail) → field is null.

groups: T59.1 — Builder with all three valid inputs: returns all three facts
T59.2 — Builder with null QuoteAdapterInput: quote field is null
T59.3 — Builder with null RegimeAdapterInput: regime field is null
T59.4 — Builder with null MonthlyRevenueAdapterInput: monthlyRevenue field is null
T59.5 — Builder with all null inputs: all three fields null
T59.6 — Builder when QuoteAdapter returns null (PIT gate fail via empty date): quote field is null
T59.7 — Builder when RegimeAdapter returns null (null pitSafetyJson): regime field is null
T59.8 — Builder when MonthlyRevenueAdapter returns null (NaN year): monthlyRevenue field is null
T59.9 — Output includes version = REAL_DATA_SNAPSHOT_INPUT_CONTRACT_VERSION
T59.10 — Output includes governance = REAL_DATA_SNAPSHOT_INPUT_GOVERNANCE
T59.11 — Output includes asOfDate forwarded from argument
T59.12 — Output has no forbidden fields at top level
T59.13 — Output has no forbidden fields in any nested fact
T59.14 — Output is JSON-serializable
T59.15 — Builder does not mutate input objects
T59.16 — ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder.ts has no DB/Prisma imports
T59.17 — ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder.ts has no network imports
T59.18 — ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder.ts only imports from P57 contract and P58 adapters
T59.19 — Output quote.pitGateStatus is PIT_SAFE when valid QuoteAdapterInput
T59.20 — Output monthlyRevenue.pitGateStatus is LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED when releaseDate null
T59.21 — governance.entersAlphaScore = false in output
T59.22 — governance.paperOnly = true in output
T59.23 — governance.notInvestmentAdvice = true in output
Cross-adapter: distinct sourceName values in output

forbidden: ROI / PnL / winRate / profit / expectedReturn / returnPct

postP59Requirement.description: After P59 commit, a P60-GATE is mandatory before any further Axis A implementation.
postP59Requirement.reason: P59 would be the 3rd consecutive Axis A. Post-P59 ratio = 15:6 = 2.50:1. Policy requires explicit gate assessment before any 4th consecutive Axis A or before crossing 3.0:1 ratio.
postP59Requirement.recommendedP60Scope: Either: (a) Axis B round (EligibilityDiff v2 or new Axis B feature), OR (b) P60-GATE explicitly authorizes 4th consecutive Axis A with strong justification.
